name: List Demo Files
description: List all available Tektronix TekScope demo session files (.tss) grouped by category. These can be loaded with RECAll:SESsion. Categories: Bus Protocols (I2C, SPI, CAN, UART, LIN, FlexRay, USB, Ethernet, MIL-1553, ARINC429, etc.), Power Analysis (switching loss, efficiency, harmonics, SOA, ripple, impedance), Measurement & Jitter (jitter, measure, histogram, NRZ, eye diagram, DPM jitter/eye), Spectrum & RF (spectrum view, ACPR, OBW, channel power), Digital (digital probes, FastAcq), Motor/IMDA (hall, resolver, QEI, mechanical, phasor, startup), Memory/DDR (DDR3 clock, read/write bursts), Automotive (SENT, PSI5, CXPI), WBG (deskew, Qoss, Rdson), Display (zoom, visual trigger, high-res, TDR, user-defined filters, FastFrame, history), and more.

steps.response:
## Available Demo Files
Path: `C:\Users\<user>\Tektronix\TekScope\demofiles\`
Load with: `RECAll:SESsion "C:\Users\<user>\Tektronix\TekScope\demofiles\<name>.tss"`

### Bus Protocols
- **I2C.tss** — I2C bus decode and trigger
- **SPI.tss** — SPI bus decode
- **CAN2.0_Demo.tss** — CAN 2.0 bus decode
- **CANFD_Demo.tss** — CAN FD bus decode
- **CANXL_Demo.tss** — CAN XL bus decode
- **LIN.tss** — LIN bus decode
- **RS-232.tss** — RS-232/UART serial decode
- **FlexRay.tss** — FlexRay bus decode
- **Ethernet.tss** — Ethernet decode
- **AutoEthernet.tss** — Automotive Ethernet
- **10BaseT1S_Demo.tss** — 10BASE-T1S Ethernet
- **USB.tss** — USB 2.0 decode
- **USB3.0_Demo.tss** — USB 3.0
- **USB3.1_G1_Demo.tss** — USB 3.1 Gen1
- **USB3.1_G2_Demo.tss** — USB 3.1 Gen2
- **USB3.2_G1_Demo.tss** — USB 3.2 Gen1
- **eUSB_Demo.tss** — eUSB decode
- **MIL-STD-1553_Demo.tss** — MIL-STD-1553
- **ARINC429_Demo.tss** — ARINC 429 avionics
- **SpaceWire_Demo.tss** — SpaceWire
- **I2S.tss** — I2S audio bus
- **SMBus.tss** — SMBus
- **MDIO.tss** — MDIO management
- **eSPI.tss** — eSPI bus
- **SVID.tss** — SVID voltage regulator
- **EtherCAT.tss** — EtherCAT industrial
- **1wire_demo.tss** — 1-Wire bus
- **8b10b.tss** — 8b/10b encoding
- **Manchester_Demo.tss** — Manchester encoding
- **SDLC_demo.tss** — SDLC protocol
- **CPhy_Demo.tss** — MIPI C-PHY
- **DPhy_Demo.tss** — MIPI D-PHY
- **SPMI_Demo.tss** — SPMI power management
- **I3C.tss** — I3C bus
- **nfcdemo.tss** — NFC
- **PCIeG2TS.tss** — PCIe Gen2
- **PCIeGen3.tss** — PCIe Gen3

### Power Analysis
- **SwitchingLoss_Demo.tss** — Switching loss measurement
- **SwitchingAnalysis.tss** — Switching analysis
- **SwitchingRipple_Demo.tss** — Switching ripple
- **SingleOutputEfficiency_Demo.tss** — Single output efficiency
- **DoubleOutputEfficiency_Demo.tss** — Double output efficiency
- **TripleOutputEfficiency_Demo.tss** — Triple output efficiency
- **Efficiency_3Phase.tss** — 3-phase efficiency
- **Efficiency_3Phase_1V1I.tss** — 3-phase efficiency (1V1I)
- **SystemEfficiency.tss** — System efficiency
- **Harmonics_3Phase.tss** — 3-phase harmonics
- **CurrentHarmonics_Demo.tss** — Current harmonics
- **PowerQuality_Demo.tss** — Power quality
- **PowerQuality_3Phase.tss** — 3-phase power quality
- **Ripple3Phase.tss** — 3-phase ripple
- **SafeOperatingArea_Demo.tss** — SOA analysis
- **Impedance_Demo.tss** — Impedance
- **Control_Loop_Response_Demo.tss** — Control loop response
- **TurnOffTime_Demo.tss** — Turn-off time
- **TurnoffTime_AC_DC.tss** — AC/DC turn-off time
- **ReverseRecoveryAnalysis.tss** — Reverse recovery
- **SimpleMagneticMeasurements_Demo.tss** — Magnetic measurements
- **Inverter_InputPower.tss** — Inverter input power
- **Inverter_PhasorDiagram.tss** — Inverter phasor diagram
- **Inverter_Ripple.tss** — Inverter ripple

### DPM (Digital Power Management)
- **DPMMultiRailRippleMeas.tss** — Multi-rail ripple
- **DPMTurnOnTimeMultiRailMeas.tss** — Multi-rail turn-on time
- **DPM_JitterEyemeas_Demo.tss** — DPM jitter & eye
- **DPM_PSIJ_Demo.tss** — DPM PSI-J

### Measurement & Jitter
- **Measure.tss** — General measurements
- **Jitter.tss** — Jitter analysis
- **NRZ_Demo.tss** — NRZ eye/jitter
- **WaveformHistogramDemo.tss** — Waveform histogram
- **Search.tss** — Search and mark

### Spectrum & RF
- **SpectrumView.tss** — Spectrum view/analysis
- **ACPR.tss** — Adjacent channel power ratio
- **OBW.tss** — Occupied bandwidth
- **ChannelPower.tss** — Channel power

### Motor Drive / IMDA
- **IMDA_Hall.tss** — IMDA Hall sensor
- **IMDA_Mech.tss** — IMDA Mechanical
- **IMDA_QEI.tss** — IMDA QEI encoder
- **IMDA_Resolver.tss** — IMDA Resolver
- **DQ0_PhasorDiagram.tss** — DQ0 phasor diagram
- **MotorStartupProfile.tss** — Motor startup profile

### WBG (Wide Band Gap)
- **WBGDeskewDemo.tss** — WBG deskew
- **WBGQoss.tss** — WBG Qoss
- **WBGRdson.tss** — WBG Rdson

### Memory / DDR
- **DDR3_ClockDiff_AC175.tss** — DDR3 clock differential
- **DDR3_ReadBursts_AC175.tss** — DDR3 read bursts
- **DDR3_WriteBursts_AC175.tss** — DDR3 write bursts

### Automotive
- **SENT_Demo.tss** — SENT protocol
- **PSI5_SensorToECU.tss** — PSI5 sensor
- **CXPI_demo.tss** — CXPI protocol

### Display & Acquisition
- **Zoom.tss** — Zoom/magnify
- **FastFrame_Demo.tss** — FastFrame acquisition
- **FastAcq.tss** — Fast acquisition
- **History_Demo.tss** — History mode
- **Digital.tss** — Digital channels
- **HighResEdge.tss** — High-res edge
- **HighResSincPulse.tss** — High-res sinc pulse
- **VisualTrigger_Demo.tss** — Visual trigger
- **TDR_Demo.tss** — TDR (time domain reflectometry)
- **UserDefinedFilters.tss** — User-defined filters

name: Load Demo File
description: Load a Tektronix demo session file (.tss) on the scope. Provide the filename. Path: C:\Users\<user>\Tektronix\TekScope\demofiles\. Use RECAll:SESsion to load. First use 'list demos' to see available files.

steps.description: Load the specified demo session file

name: Power Analysis Demos
description: List power analysis demo files: switching loss, efficiency, harmonics, SOA, ripple, impedance, control loop, turn-off time, reverse recovery, magnetic measurements, inverter analysis.

steps.response:
Power analysis demos:
- SwitchingLoss_Demo.tss
- SwitchingAnalysis.tss
- SwitchingRipple_Demo.tss
- SingleOutputEfficiency_Demo.tss
- DoubleOutputEfficiency_Demo.tss
- TripleOutputEfficiency_Demo.tss
- SystemEfficiency.tss
- Efficiency_3Phase.tss
- Harmonics_3Phase.tss
- CurrentHarmonics_Demo.tss
- PowerQuality_Demo.tss
- SafeOperatingArea_Demo.tss
- Impedance_Demo.tss
- Control_Loop_Response_Demo.tss
- TurnOffTime_Demo.tss
- ReverseRecoveryAnalysis.tss

Say 'load demo SwitchingLoss_Demo' to load one.

Say 'load demo I2C' to load one.

name: Edge Trigger Setup
description: Configure edge trigger on a Tektronix scope. Key commands: TRIGger:A:TYPe EDGE, TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce CH<x>, TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe {RISe|FALL|EITher}, TRIGger:A:LEVel:CH<x> <voltage>. Use TRIGger:A (primary) not TRIGger:B (secondary).

steps.description: Set edge trigger: type=EDGE, source=CH1, slope=RISE, level=0V. Adjust source/slope/level as needed.

name: Zone Trigger (Visual Trigger)
description: Configure visual/zone trigger on a Tektronix scope. Zone trigger defines a rectangular area on the display — the scope triggers when the waveform enters or exits the zone. Key commands: VISual:ENABLE ON, VISual:AREA<x>:SHAPE RECTangle, VISual:AREA<x>:SOUrce CH<x>, VISual:AREA<x>:YAXis:MAX/MIN, VISual:AREA<x>:XAXis:MAX/MIN, VISual:AREA<x>:LOGICSTATE {IN|OUT}.

steps.description: Enable visual/zone trigger with rectangular area on CH1, trigger when signal enters the zone. Adjust area bounds with XAXis:MAX/MIN and YAXis:MAX/MIN.

name: Add Arrow Callout
description: Add an arrow-style callout annotation pointing at a specific location on the scope display. Use TYPe ARROW (not NOTE). Arrow callouts have a leader line. NOTE is just floating text. Steps: ADDNew → TYPe ARROW → TEXT → DISPLAYPOSition X/Y.

steps.description: Add arrow callout: ARROW type has leader line pointing to target. Replace {n} with callout number, {text} with label, {x}/{y} with position (0-100).
